title: Preference Pair (DPO)
description: Single preference training example (chosen vs rejected) emitted by Trainforge's synthesize_training stage. One JSONL line per pair. Rejected responses are drawn from explicit misconceptions in the chunk when present, or synthesized from a deterministic distractor rule otherwise.

prompt.description: The shared question posed to both chosen and rejected. Must not contain a verbatim 50+-char span from the source chunk text.

chosen.description: The preferred completion (grounded in chunk content).

rejected.description: The dispreferred completion. Encodes a misconception or a rule-synthesized wrong answer. Must differ from chosen with token-Jaccard delta >= 0.3.

misconception_id.description: Stable id for the misconception encoded in the rejected answer, when the rejected answer was drawn from an explicit misconception. Null when the rejected answer was rule-synthesized.
